notes.title: Welcome to horus-os
notes.preview: Start here. This note explains how memory works: your agents read and write plain markdown notes, and you can browse every one of them right here.

notes.title: Project Overview
notes.preview: horus-os is a self-hosted autonomous command center. The runtime is Python, the dashboard is Next.js, and persistence is SQLite.

notes.title: Team Charter
notes.preview: Five starter agents coordinate around a shared goal queue. The Coordinator delegates, specialists execute.

notes.title: Release Checklist
notes.preview: Run the test suite, update the changelog, tag the version, and verify the static export builds clean.
